semantics: The waterline governs continuous gold status after a baseline audit. A complete baseline authorizes one bounded Luna cycle, not unlimited growth. The next cycle remains blocked until the prior lease is terminal, every new media facet is again complete, and a reviewed cycle receipt exists. This file defines evidence requirements; it never marks a roadmap milestone complete.

scopes.label: Star Trek rolling gold shard
scopes.note: The exact-subject baseline must return to zero debt between every bounded Luna cycle. Rejected and source-blocked research may close tasks, but a successful gold-shard cycle must resolve at least one card through canonical merge and media closure.

operations.note: Cost per verified record must be measured before the operating-reliability evidence is ready, but no unsupported cost target is invented. Metrics and drills are evidence inputs to reviewed roadmap receipts, never automatic milestone completion.
